name: Savory Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the pork, rolled oats, milk, garlic, egg, salt, and pepper.
2. Shape into 1-inch balls.
3. Arrange one-third of the meatballs about half an inch apart in a 9-inch microwaveable pie plate.
4. Cover the dish with vented plastic wrap.
5. Microwave at HIGH (100% power) for 3 or 4 minutes, or until no longer pink inside, rotating the dish halfway through cooking time.
6. Let stand, covered, for 2 minutes.
7. Drain excess liquid.
